titleStmt.title: SII 9.205: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 205. (A.R. No. 245 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT YARABALU, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 47, Śubhakrit, • • shya, śu. 7, Vaḍḍavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1122 December 7 Thursday, the Uttarāyaṇa day, however, falling on December 25 Monday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva, who is said to have conquered first the Gaṅgas, then the Chōḷas and the Lāḷas, to have levied tribute from the Pāñchālas and subjugated the rest. His feudatory Pāṇḍyadēva who chased the king of Ratnapura at his master's command was ruling the Noḷambavāḍi thirty-twothousand province. Māchabōva and Siṅgabōva are stated to have made a gift of some plots of land for the service of the god Mahādēva. Āskandadēva wrote the inscription and Kētōja engraved it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirā
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvavijayarājya
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ stiraṁ bhavati . modaloḷu gaṁgāvanī paṭṭama
maṇḍaḷatristhaḷa sā(ṁ)mrājyāṁkamaṁ tattritayadoḷe lasaddrāviḷa
mallaṁ tribhuvanavibhavaṁ cakravarttitvamaṁ tāḷdidajēyaṁ rāyanārā
vikramāṁka . cōḷana darppamaṁ kiḍisi lāḷananattaladirppi tāḷdi pāṁcāḷana kappa
bedaṟaṭṭi mikka bhopāḷaraṁ mēḷapāḷiyoḷu pūṇisi vikramacakri ca
daṁ mahāmahimeyiṁ vanadhivritadhātrīcakramaṁ . jaḷadhiya guṇpu
manarkkanudagratējadakkaḷikeya peṁpumaṁ taḷedu tannoḷu vikramacakri
rana(ṁ)nyarāyara poḍarppanaḍaṁgisi koṇḍu kappamaṁ baḷayisi pāṇḍyama(ṁ)ṇḍaḷika
nimirccida . pati besase ratnapuraduddhatanaṁ beṁkoṇḍu sūṟegoṁḍāpurama
vatanittu patige bā®penalu pāṇḍyanripa . svasti śrīmanmahāma
ḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvaticchāsiramaṁ . sukhasaṁkhatāvinōda
daṟoḷage Eraṁbāḷūraḍeya spāmidēvaṁ sukhadinire śrīmattribhu
pāṁḍyadēva jagatimukhyarappa srīmatu mācabōvanuṁ siṁgabōvanuṁ sukha
ḷanāḷuttamirddu . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 47 neya subhakritusaṁvatsa
ṣya suddha 7 vaḍḍavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti byatīpātadaṁdu śrīmahādēvara nivēdyakke māda
ṭṭeyiṁ pattire paḍuvalu baḍagaṇa sīmeya paḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu biṭṭa gadde nālnūṟu maṭhakke biṭṭa
yinnūṟu berddale Erekeṟeyoḷage Uppinamōḷeyiṁ teṁka biṭṭa mattareraḍu Ūrinda teṁkalu pūli
keṟeya sīmeyalu maṭhakke biṭṭa berddale mattaroṁdu piriyakeṟeya keḷage brahmeya
na māḷigeyiṁ teṁka modalēriyalu keṟege biṭṭa gadde kamma 500 keṟeyoḷagaṇa kēdageya
kaṭṭada modalēriyalli Ā kaṭṭake biṭṭa gardde mūnūṟu gūḷimeyanakaṭṭake biṭṭa gardde yi(ṁ)nnūru
�yo dharmmamanāvanorvva pratipāḷisida sāsira kavileya ko(ṁ)ṇḍu kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnuṁ beḷḷi
yalu (kōḍu koḷagumaṁ) kaṭṭisi vāṇarāsikurukṣētradalu caturvvēdapāragarappa sahasra brāhma
ṇargge dānaṁgeyda phalamakku Ī dharmmamanāvanorvvanaḷidanā kavileymaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda pātakanakku .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭirvvarśasahasrāṇā miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
svasti śrīmatu tūbigeṟeya Ūraḍeya Āskaṁdadēvaru bareda śāsana kētōja hoyda .
Digital edition of SII 9.205 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
